description_long: This radiator features a series of deep, vertical fins arranged in a zigzag pattern, providing a large surface area for heat dissipation. The main body is a bold, matte red color, with a solid rectangular base in a muted brown tone that appears to provide stability and support. The fins are evenly spaced and extend the full height of the radiator, creating a visually striking, corrugated appearance. There are no visible control valves or adjustment knobs on the exterior, suggesting a minimalist design. The overall construction appears robust, likely made from metal for efficient heat transfer. The radiator is designed to be floor-standing, with its base resting directly on the ground.
description: A bold, matte red radiator with deep vertical zigzag fins and a solid brown base, designed for floor-standing installation. The robust, corrugated metal body maximizes heat dissipation and visual impact.
description_view_0: The radiator is seen from the front, showcasing its full width and the prominent zigzag vertical fins.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the depth of the fins and the thickness of the radiator, as well as the solid brown base.
description_view_2: The radiator is viewed from the back, displaying the same vertical fin pattern and the full height of the object.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the fin depth and the sturdy base.
